papergraph.title: Qwen-guided PaperGraph for autonomous science
papergraph.citation: Chen Yu et al. (2026) Qwen-guided PaperGraph for autonomous science doi:10.5555/qwen.papergraph.2026
papergraph.abstract: We introduce a Qwen-guided extractor that converts papers into structured evidence for autonomous scientific discovery.
papergraph.conclusion: LLM JSON extraction improves recall, while citation uniqueness and credibility scoring reduce duplicate evidence.
strengths: Conclusion: LLM JSON extraction improves recall, while citation uniqueness and credibility scoring reduce duplicate evidence.
Strengths: Strong structured extraction. Better provenance.
improvements: Limitations: External APIs can be rate limited. PDF text quality remains variable.
papergraph.contribution: Conclusion: LLM JSON extraction improves recall, while citation uniqueness and credibility scoring reduce duplicate evidence.
papergraph.limitation: Limitations: External APIs can be rate limited. PDF text quality remains variable.
